public FullscreenViewerWindow(IReadOnlyList<MediaEntityRow> rows, int initialIndex,                                   BitmapSource? preloaded = null)     {         InitializeComponent();          _rows = [.. rows];         _currentIndex = Math.Clamp(initialIndex, 0, Math.Max(0, rows.Count - 1));          _overlayTimer.Tick += (_, _) => HideOverlay();         MouseMove += (_, _) => ShowOverlay();          if (preloaded is not null)         {             // Show the preloaded image immediately while the async load             // populates _versions with all available quality tiers.             FitImage.Source  = preloaded;             ZoomImage.Source = preloaded;         }          // Always load asynchronously — this populates _versions for TAB cycling         // and replaces the preloaded image with the full decode when ready.         _ = LoadCurrentAsync();          Loaded += (_, _) => { Focus(); ShowOverlay(); };     }

public MainWindow(ShellViewModel viewModel)     {         InitializeComponent();         DataContext = viewModel;          // Restore keyboard focus to the grid after each folder load so the user         // can immediately use cursor keys and Enter to navigate without clicking.         // BeginInvoke at ContextIdle defers until after the current dispatcher         // frame — including any OS focus-restoration that fires when a Win32         // dialog (folder picker) hands focus back to the last-clicked button.         viewModel.FolderLoaded += (_, _) =>         {             if (MediaGrid.Items.Count > 0 && MediaGrid.SelectedItem is null)                 MediaGrid.SelectedIndex = 0;              Dispatcher.BeginInvoke(                 () => MediaGrid.Focus(),                 System.Windows.Threading.DispatcherPriority.ContextIdle);         };     }

public MainWindow(ShellViewModel viewModel)     {         InitializeComponent();         DataContext = viewModel;          // Restore keyboard focus to the grid after each folder load so the user         // can immediately use cursor keys and Enter to navigate without clicking.         // BeginInvoke at ContextIdle defers until after the current dispatcher         // frame — including any OS focus-restoration that fires when a Win32         // dialog (folder picker) hands focus back to the last-clicked button.         viewModel.FolderLoaded += (_, _) =>         {             if (MediaGrid.Items.Count > 0 && MediaGrid.SelectedItem is null)                 MediaGrid.SelectedIndex = 0;              Dispatcher.BeginInvoke(                 () => MediaGrid.Focus(),                 System.Windows.Threading.DispatcherPriority.ContextIdle);         };     }
